pageContext.name: Velma
pageContext.description: 'Jinkies!'  Sideshow and MG Collectibles and Toys are excited to present the Velma 1:6 Scale Statue!  Everyone loves Velma! She's the trendy investigator that every Scooby-Doo fan has a soft spot for. With that in mind, this beautifully hand-painted, unique Scooby-Doo collectible statue brings her to life!  Fall in love with her trendy clothes, her short haircut, cute glasses, and fun socks – a classic look from the Saturday morning cartoon show.  The collectible includes two alternate hand sculpts for alternate display choices. Purchase the Fred Jones & Daphne Blake and Scooby-Doo & Shaggy statues to complete your collection and build your own Mystery Inc. scene!
